title: Create: Future
body:
# Description
This modpack is for improving the game with futuristic things like space travel, cooking, automations, parkour, more biomes & better animated entities like player models and mobs.

# Why Download?
Create: Future adds Mekanism & Create and some other mods to make it feel like everything is from the future. Create: Future also comes with performance mods to improve FPS, especially by shaders & huge mods. We also have cosmetic mods and cape physics to customize your player model on however you would like. Create: Future also contains mods to reduce FPS from Minecraft if it is in the background so you can work further undisturbed.

# Current Resources
